llm_route_weight_response.global_rationale: Weights mostly preserve observed route frequency while modestly boosting clusters with coherent distance distributions and reducing singleton, near-idle, or highly outlier-driven clusters.
risks: No zone, stop-profile, or route-shape context was available, so adjustments rely mainly on frequency and distance statistics.
Rare but operationally important route types may be underweighted if their evidence appears only in a few days.

final_scenario.sampling_method: LLM-adjusted route-cluster weights. Target routes sample from llm_route_cluster_weight; other routes sample from truck_appearance_frequency * llm_route_cluster_weight.
